landing.heroTitle: every rupiah of zakat leaves a trail.
landing.heroSubtitle: donate Rp 100,000. see exactly which mustahik received it. no hidden cut, no fake distribution, no missing accountability.
landing.howItWorksTitle: three cryptographic signatures. zero blind trust.
landing.step1Body: you pick donation type, amount, and laz. your signature becomes an on-chain commitment on solana.
landing.step2Body: the amil assigns your donation to a specific mustahik, records the purpose, and signs the distribution decision.
landing.step3Body: the recipient receives a secure link and confirms receipt. three signatures, one verifiable chain.
landing.feedEmpty: waiting for the first activity today…
landing.footerCtaTitle: ready to pay zakat with full transparency?
landing.footerCtaBody: no crypto wallet required. sign in with email — we handle the rest.

footer.credits: Mizaan © 2026 — built on the Solana Attestation Service. Devnet only.

donate.pageTitle: pay zakat with a provable trail.
donate.pageSubtitle: six short steps. one cryptographic signature. your zakat gets etched on solana, forever.

step1.title: pick a donation type.
step1.subtitle: different obligations have different math. pick one to begin.

step2.title: set your donation amount.
step2.subtitleZakatMal: enter your total wealth. we'll auto-compute 2.5% against the current nisab.
step2.subtitleFitrah: one sha' of rice ≈ Rp 45,000 per person. pick the headcount.
step2.subtitleFree: voluntary donation, any amount. pick a quick chip or type manually.
step2.wealthHint: wealth held for at least one full year (haul). gold, savings, investments, non-primary property.
step2.belowNisab: below nisab — zakat mal is not yet obligatory.
step2.overrideHint: you can adjust the amount manually.

step3.title: pick a recipient laz.
step3.subtitle: every laz here is baznas-verified and has an on-chain identity attestation.

step4.title: category preference.
step4.subtitle: the laz will prioritize these categories when distributing your zakat. leave empty if you have no preference.
step4.skipNote: skippable — the laz will prioritize based on need.

step5.title: connect your wallet.
step5.subtitle: no crypto wallet? log in with email — we handle the rest.
step5.haveWalletBody: phantom, solflare, or any solana wallet. you keep full control of your private key.
step5.noWalletBody: no crypto know-how needed. we provision a secure wallet via privy, encrypted on your device.

step6.title: review then sign.
step6.subtitle: one click creates one solana attestation and transfers idrz to the laz wallet.
step6.disclaimer: this action will: (1) sign 1 sas attestation `mizaan_donation_v1` on solana, (2) transfer idrz from your wallet to the laz wallet. transactions cannot be undone once confirmed.

success.title: your zakat has been signed.
success.subtitle: attestation successfully created on solana devnet. the laz will begin distribution within 7 business days.
